sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28152" key="doulagwgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δουλᾰγωγ-ός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n28152.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">enslaving,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δ. θηρίον ἡ ἡδονή</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Volupt.Fr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
